# Fursay

Fursay is a parent-child bilingual story platform for young families. The site helps parents choose one short story, try one phrase together, and receive a weekly story pack by email.

Primary site:
- https://fursay.com/

Localized home pages:
- English: https://fursay.com/
- Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/
- Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/

Story worlds:
- Koko's Forest Adventure: English-Chinese stories for Mandarin-speaking families, ages 2-8.
  - Site: https://fursay.com/koko
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/koko
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/koko
  - YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@KokosForest
- Arabic Kids Chinese Picture Book: Arabic-Chinese stories with Pinyin support for Arabic-speaking families, ages 3-6.
  - Site: https://fursay.com/arabic
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/arabic
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/arabic
  - YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ArabicKidsChinese

Episode landing pages:
- Koko feelings story pack: https://fursay.com/episodes/koko-feelings
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/koko-feelings
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/koko-feelings
- Noor colors story pack: https://fursay.com/episodes/noor-colors
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/noor-colors
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/noor-colors

Useful actions:
- Choose a story world from the home page.
- Watch one free story on YouTube.
- Subscribe to the Koko or Noor weekly story pack.
- Join Koko's weekly English story pack: https://fursay.com/join/koko
- Join Noor's weekly Chinese story pack: https://fursay.com/join/noor
- Preview Koko's sample story pack: https://fursay.com/sample/koko
- Preview Noor's sample story pack: https://fursay.com/sample/noor
- Social profile story-pack chooser: https://fursay.com/links
- Share Koko's family sample link: https://fursay.com/share/koko
- Share Noor's family sample link: https://fursay.com/share/noor
- Koko social profile bio link: https://fursay.com/bio/koko
- Noor social profile bio link: https://fursay.com/bio/noor
- Creator link for Koko descriptions: https://fursay.com/creator/koko
- Creator link for Noor descriptions: https://fursay.com/creator/noor
- Koko YouTube creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/koko/youtube
- Koko social creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/koko/social
- Koko newsletter creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/koko/newsletter
- Noor YouTube creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/noor/youtube
- Noor social creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/noor/social
- Noor newsletter creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/noor/newsletter
- Creator kit page: https://fursay.com/creator-kit
- Family share kit page: https://fursay.com/share-kit
- Traffic launch kit page: https://fursay.com/traffic-launch
- Social profile links page: https://fursay.com/links
- Deploy readiness page: https://fursay.com/deploy-readiness
- Conversion health dashboard: https://fursay.com/conversion-health
- Shortlink manifest: https://fursay.com/shortlinks.json
- Video discovery manifest: https://fursay.com/video-discovery.json

Commerce and affiliate policy:
- Traditional Chinese pages use Books.com.tw affiliate links only: https://fursay.com/zh/, https://fursay.com/zh/koko, https://fursay.com/zh/arabic, https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/koko-feelings, https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/noor-colors
- Books.com.tw affiliate ID: arthur0858
- Current expected Books.com.tw affiliate links: 16
- English and Arabic pages use Amazon affiliate links only: https://fursay.com/, https://fursay.com/koko, https://fursay.com/arabic, https://fursay.com/episodes/koko-feelings, https://fursay.com/episodes/noor-colors, https://fursay.com/ar/, https://fursay.com/ar/koko, https://fursay.com/ar/arabic, https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/koko-feelings, https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/noor-colors
- Amazon Associates Store ID: parenttechche-20
- Current expected Amazon affiliate links: 33
- Affiliate click tracking is expected on all 15 public story and episode pages.
- Anonymous conversion events post to /api/event and use Worker logs while Cloudflare Analytics Engine enablement is pending; the planned binding is FURSAY_EVENTS, dataset fursay_events, with no PII fields.
- Event reporting path: npm run report:events writes /tmp/fursay-event-analytics-report/event-analytics-report.json and queries five 7-day Analytics Engine summaries only after Cloudflare credentials and dataset enablement are available.
- Owned products are interest-validation only: Koko printable pack and Noor 3-minute worksheet pack. Payment links are disabled until the checkout gate requirements are met.
- Event analytics must not include email, name, phone, address, token, password, or subscriber payload fields.

Technical discovery:
- Sitemap: https://fursay.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://fursay.com/robots.txt
- LLM discovery file: https://fursay.com/llms.txt
- Site health: https://fursay.com/site-health.json
- Release manifest: https://fursay.com/release.json
- Deploy readiness page: https://fursay.com/deploy-readiness
- Deploy readiness manifest: https://fursay.com/deploy-readiness.json
- Campaign manifest: https://fursay.com/campaigns.json
- Creator kit: https://fursay.com/creator-kit.json
- Share kit: https://fursay.com/share-kit.json
- Traffic launch kit: https://fursay.com/traffic-launch.json
- Social profile links manifest: https://fursay.com/links.json
- Conversion health dashboard: https://fursay.com/conversion-health
- Conversion health manifest: https://fursay.com/conversion-health.json
- Shortlinks: https://fursay.com/shortlinks.json
- Deploy readiness gate: npm run deploy:ready
- Local release gate: npm run check
- Cloudflare deploy command: npm run deploy
